title: 3 Places That Don't Look Real

segments.text: This lake is bright pink, and it's completely real.
And it's only the beginning.
A desert of golden dunes spills straight into the sea.
A whole forest of stone rises from the ground.
And a waterfall seems to pour into the clouds.
Earth looks photoshopped, but every bit is real.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: Earth looks photoshopped — but it's all real. Follow for daily hidden places!

title: Hidden Wonders Most People Never See

segments.text: Some of Earth's best places almost no one visits.
And the first one feels like another planet.
Glowing blue caves hide beneath quiet hills.
Turquoise pools step down a mountainside.
And a sea of clouds rolls below the peaks.
The most beautiful places are often the quietest.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: Earth's most beautiful places are often the quietest. Follow for daily hidden places!

title: Earth's Most Surreal Landscapes

segments.text: Some landscapes look like a painting, not a place.
And the last one barely looks possible.
Salt flats turn into the world's largest mirror.
Red mountains ripple like waves of stone.
And fields of lavender stretch past the horizon.
Our planet is stranger and more beautiful than fiction.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: Our planet is stranger than fiction. Follow for daily hidden places!
